title: The Zero-Drag Flat-File CMS
content:
{"time":1784454976831,"blocks":[{"id":"zzD_An_PSd","type":"header","data":{"text":"SonaCMS","level":2},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"oSuIiFqw4T","type":"columns","data":{"cols":[{"time":1784454976829,"blocks":[{"id":"wf0V0-DAy7","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"The Zero-Drag Flat-File CMS"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"cgwKf99QAI","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Build fast, secure websites with no database, no monthly fees, and no ecosystem lock-in. Download it, style it your way, and deploy it anywhere PHP runs.
To see how it works:"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"o7o_bxjRVf","type":"button","data":{"text":"Download SonaCMS","url":"https://sonacms.com/deploy/SonaCMS-V1.3.zip","style":"primary"}},{"id":"oS-rbfb4m2","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"No database, no drama. Everything lives in simple files. Nothing to hack, nothing to back up, nothing to pay for month after month."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"ece4Eco7ww","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Fast and found. Lightweight pages load quickly and are built to be indexed cleanly by search engines and AI.
"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"ZgzyDCrK4j","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Yours to shape. A clean, un-opinionated starting point — designers restyle it freely without fighting someone else's theme.
"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"ITc-RmVvG4","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Looks simple? That's the point. What you're seeing is the blank canvas. SonaCMS ships un-styled on purpose — the download is the engine, not a finished site. Designers and developers get a clean foundation they fully control, with every part they'll touch kept cleanly separate from the core. SonaCMS is a tool you build with — best downloaded and explored from a desktop or laptop."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}}],"version":"2.31.6"},{"time":1784454976831,"blocks":[{"id":"tbVLF1VGhc","type":"image","data":{"file":{"url":"/assets/images/uploads/01fb381c69b02636-1783587627.jpg"},"caption":"","mode":"lightbox","linkUrl":"","newTab":true}}],"version":"2.31.6"}]}},{"id":"XtFJ4FdycW","type":"columns","data":{"cols":[{"time":1784454976829,"blocks":[{"id":"0sjHMTU-Ej","type":"image","data":{"file":{"url":"/assets/images/uploads/fd8075398fe935cd-1783548266.png"},"caption":"Peter Bishop, Founder, SonaCMS","mode":"link","linkUrl":"https://sonacms.com/peter-bishop-founder","newTab":false}}],"version":"2.31.6"},{"time":1784454976831,"blocks":[{"id":"kmsfWfBEDw","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Whether you're a designer wanting full control, a developer tired of bloated platforms, or someone learning how a real website fits together — SonaCMS is a production-ready CMS you can read end to end and make your own. "},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"EkBEbwv3bp","type":"button","data":{"text":"Download SonaCMS","url":"https://sonacms.com/deploy/SonaCMS-V1.3.zip","style":"primary"}},{"id":"b7tsNBYbf1","type":"button","data":{"text":"Login to the Demo","url":"https://demo.sonacms.com","style":"secondary"}},{"id":"QWCl0e_gsj","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"SonaCMS is free for educational use, not-for-profits and evaluation. For commercial projects you must purchase a licence."},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"f-hM_wJdTp","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"🏆 $49 Single Site Licence (per website)"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"1K3Y77czTt","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"🏆 $199 Developer Licence (unlimited websites, annual)"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"NFN5Rmuqiv","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"🙏Donate to SonaCMS (help support our development)"},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"RILglaEKez","type":"header","data":{"text":"Questions and Support","level":3},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"CbJxxK8-SV","type":"paragraph","data":{"text":"Use the form below to contact us and join our Mailing List so we can keep you informed with new releases of SonaCMS. "},"tunes":{"alignment":{"alignment":"left"}}},{"id":"567Oa4NwEZ","type":"form","data":{"formId":"contact"}}],"version":"2.31.6"}]}},{"id":"_V4YRwF3U6","type":"video","data":{"service":"youtube","originalUrl":"https://youtu.be/oiszeeR9ICE","embedUrl":"https://www.youtube.com/embed/oiszeeR9ICE"}},{"id":"8O0Tmp7iMw","type":"gallery","data":{"images":[{"url":"/assets/images/uploads/0541cec94d82fcb1-1784454737.jpg","caption":"Dolphins"},{"url":"/assets/images/uploads/3afea698a74bcf06-1784454738.png","caption":"Peter B."},{"url":"/assets/images/uploads/6403872bc2953c7f-1784454738.jpg","caption":"Peter B."}]}},{"id":"wTQxPQMt2p","type":"author","data":{"authorId":"peter-bishop"}}],"version":"2.31.6"}
meta_description: SonaCMS is a high-performance, database-free content management system built for speed, security, and absolute portability.
